bio:
I help founders and executives turn what they know into content people actually consume, then build the tools that get it out the door. I run Total Emphasis, a Brooklyn content systems, strategy, and ghostwriting firm, working with Fortune 500 companies, top consultancies, and high-growth startups, in fields from AdTech and SaaS to global consulting, telecom, and security.

I started as a reporter in 2001, was editor-in-chief of PRWeek, and have ghostwritten executive thought leadership since 2009, from LinkedIn posts and bylines to newsletters, reports, and whitepapers. I also build the tools behind the work: an AI newsletter engine, MCP servers for my CRM, and a desktop app for my ghostwriting pipeline. I'm always tinkering with something new.
newsletters: I run several newsletters: [141 Miles](https://www.141miles.com), a publication about the Jersey Shore, and [The Diffraction](https://www.thediffraction.com), a music publication. On hiatus: [Survival Signal](https://survivalsignal.beehiiv.com), a newsletter about how to be an independent worker.
previously: I've held roles at tmrw life sciences, Haymarket Media, Horizon Media, and Attention USA.
outsideOfWork: I'm an avid learner: I read and cook a lot, and I'm trying very hard to remain on the soccer pitch and lower my golf handicap.
